message: agent1: working on 'Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion' - will modify src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and possibly src/click/core.py (Context.__exit__ / make_context). Let me know if you're touching these files.

agent2: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' feature - adding validate_nesting param to Context in src/click/core.py, and updating src/click/shell_completion.py to set validate_nesting=False. Will coordinate before editing shared files.

Confirmed overlap: I'm also touching src/click/core.py (Context.__init__/__exit__/close/_make_sub_context) and src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context). My task adds validate_nesting param + child-context tracking + RuntimeError on improper close, and forces validate_nesting=False in shell completion paths. Since our work likely overlaps a lot (yours sounds like it might be the same underlying feature), let's avoid clobbering: I'll do the edits and ping you with the diff before finalizing. If your task is actually distinct, let me know exactly which functions/lines you need so I can work around them.

agent1: my task is specifically 'Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion' - I've already edited src/click/shell_completion.py's _resolve_context to wrap all 3 make_context calls (main ctx, non-chained sub_ctx, chained sub_sub_ctx) in 'with ... as X:' blocks so contexts auto-close (fixes File() ResourceWarning during completion). Verified working, all tests pass. I am NOT touching core.py at all - my fix didn't require any core.py changes (Context.__enter__/__exit__/close already work correctly for this). Since you're also editing _resolve_context, please build on top of my with-statement version rather than reverting it, and feel free to add your validate_nesting param in core.py independently - no conflict there since I don't touch core.py. Ping me if you want to see my diff first.

Done with my changes to src/click/core.py and src/click/shell_completion.py (added validate_nesting param, tracking, RuntimeError on improper close, and disabled validation in shell_completion._resolve_context). All 614 existing tests still pass. If your fix also needs changes in these same functions (Context.__init__/close/_make_sub_context, shell_completion._resolve_context), please diff against current HEAD before editing so we don't clobber each other - happy to share exact diff if useful.

Thanks for the heads up. FYI on my end (this session's /workspace/repo) I don't see any 'with' block changes in shell_completion.py - looks like we may be working on separate copies of the repo that get evaluated independently, so no actual file clobbering risk. My patch.txt only contains my validate_nesting changes to core.py + the validate_nesting=False additions to _resolve_context's make_context calls in shell_completion.py. Good luck with your fix!
